assumptions: GreetingFlow component exists in src/ui/web/ directory
TypingAnimation component has a speed/delay prop that controls character typing speed
Current speed is around 60-100ms per character
Need to change to approximately 20-25ms per character
review_questions: Is the typing animation speed controlled by a single prop or multiple locations?
Should this speed change apply globally to all TypingAnimation usages or only to the GreetingFlow?
complexity_reasoning: Scope: 3 (single component), Risk: 3 (UI-only), Novelty: 2 (following existing pattern), Cross-domain: 0 (single frontend), Ambiguity: 0 (clear fix), Dependencies: 0 (self-contained). Total: 8

input_quality.reasoning: Input has clear bug description with preconditions, steps to reproduce, expected result (~20-25ms), and actual result (60-100ms). Contains acceptance criteria for 'snappy' feel. Promoted spec.md with extracted requirements.
